features: Light Up Moments That Matter with the Berry Festive Kiss automatic air freshener spray from the Glade Winter Collection.
This limited edition automatic spray brings festive warmth to every gathering with the scent of mixed berries and holiday cheer.
Enjoy a fresh burst every 9, 18 or 36 minutes so you can simply activate, forget and focus on enjoying the festive mood.
Glade spray scents are crafted by master perfumers and infused with essential oils.
description: Product Description The Glade Large Automatic Spray utilizes TrueScent Technology, a special blend of ingredients crafted to evoke nostalgic moments and enrich your surroundings with enduring fragrance. Share your story through scent with this diffuser and enjoy up to 2 months of the joyful aroma of mixed berries and holiday cheer. Immerse yourself in festive gatherings, enhanced with essential oils. Delight in periodic bursts every 9, 18, or 36 minutes, ensuring your room is always infused with a welcoming fragrance. Ingredients Quaternary ammonium compounds, benzyl-C12-16-alkyldimethyl, chlorides Ingredients Quaternary ammonium compounds, benzyl-C12-16-alkyldimethyl, chlorides
